name: Cheese Sauce ("Adventures in Microwave Cooking")
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup (2 ounces) Shredded Sharp Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 1-quart glass measuring pitcher in the microwave oven for about 30 seconds at High. Add flour and blend to a smooth paste.
2. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly.
3. Cook uncovered in the microwave oven for 4 minutes at High, or until thickened; stir vigorously after 2 minutes, then every 30 seconds.
4. Add salt, dry mustard, and cheese to the sauce; stir well. Cook uncovered in the microwave oven for 1 minute at High; stir.
Yield: About 1 cup.
